meta.title: Nucleotide sequence of the Bacillus subtilis dnaD gene -- Bruand et al. 141 (2): 321 -- Microbiology

abstractHtml: The dnaD gene of Bacillus subtilis was identified within a 104 kb DNA segment cloned into a yeast artificial chromosome. The nucleotide sequence of the wild type and dnaD23 mutant genes were determined. dnaD is predicted to encode a protein of 232 amino acids with no similarity to proteins in the data banks.
